case_title: KATHLEEN NEEDHAM VS. GREGORY IRVING et al

docket_entries.description: JUDGE RONALD EVANS QUIDACHAY, CLERK NICOLE OLCOMENDY, REPORTER BELDON YEE. MASTER COURT CALENDAR OF MAR-25-2002 ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON MAR-25-2002 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 611, DIANE WICK. SENT AS COURT TRIAL, MAY BE RESET AS JURY UPON EVIDENCE OF POSTING JURY FEES TIMELY.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT IRVING, GREGORY STONE, KENNETH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 62 CONRAD, UPPER UNIT & ALL OF THE BUILDING, STAYED UNTIL APR-09-2002, SEE SCANNED DOC NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
STIPULATION TO SET ASIDE AND VACATE JUDGMENT WITH ORDER SETTING ASIDE AND VACATING JUDGMENT, FILED BY PLAINTIFF

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NEEDHAM, KATHLEEN AS TO DEFENDANT IRVING, GREGORY STONE, KENNETH DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT IRVING, GREGORY STONE, KENNETH
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT HEARING SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR MAR-19-2002 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 218
MINUTES FOR MAR-25-2002 11:00 AM FOR DEPT 611
MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF NEEDHAM, KATHLEEN SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON MAR-25-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

COURT TRIAL SET FOR MAR-25-2002 VACATED. NEGOTIATED SETTLEMENT REACHED. STIPULATED JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF READ INTO COURT RECORD. JUDGE WICK; BETH WILBER, A.M. D. CARTER, P.M. CLERKS; BRENDA FIELDS, CSR.
